heading: Administration of liberated and occupied areas
label: 8607 Administration of liberated and occupied areas
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7207(as applicable to administration of liberated and occupied areas).5 U.S.C. 421f(as applicable to administration of liberated and occupied areas), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 3860 Stat. 858.5 U.S.C. 412a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 3960 Stat. 858In subsection (b) the words “except the authority to prescribe regulations” are omitted, since contains no authority for the Secretary of the Navy to prescribe regulations for the administration of that section.5 U.S.C. 421f

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy may, out of any appropriation made for the purpose, provide for the administration of liberated and occupied areas by the Department of the Navy.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, to the extent he considers proper, may delegate the authority conferred by this section to any person in the Department of the Navy, with or without the authority to make successive redelegations.
